_architecture: regionTerms: mixed EN+local tokens for pipeline/discovery text matching (not the same as per-locale Google q=). newsdataQueries: one row per language/market for NewsData.io. Generic googleNews templates expand into q= strings; each template row may set templateLocaleHlPrefixes (same length as templates) so a query runs only on editions whose hl matches. Sub-regional geo and cult OR-groups live in data/discovery/region/*.json; harm and journalism/justice/victim/media signals per locale in data/discovery/lang/*.json; optional genericCultTerms, strictCultTermExtensions, and groupStopwords per file feed pipeline matching and cluster phrase stoplists. null = all europe locales in the grid. Publisher watchlist queries use site: and stay edition-scoped via localesForGoogleNewsPublisherQuery.

googleNewsQueryDefinitions._docs: Inline `groups` removed; loaded from `groupFiles` in discoveryConfig.ts. Sub-regional geo/cult OR-groups: `data/discovery/region/*.json`. `templateLocaleHlPrefixes`: per-template hl subtag(s), same order as `templates`.

newsdataQueries: (cult OR sect OR "high control group" OR "coercive control" OR brainwashing OR "religious abuse") AND (UK OR "United Kingdom" OR Britain OR England OR Scotland OR Wales OR Ireland)
(secte OR "derive sectaire" OR "abus spirituel" OR gourou OR emprise) AND (France OR Belgique OR Belgium)
(sekte OR sekten OR guru OR "geistlicher missbrauch" OR "psychische manipulation") AND (Deutschland OR Germany OR Oesterreich OR Austria OR Schweiz OR Switzerland)
(secta OR sectario OR "abuso espiritual" OR "control coercitivo") AND (Espana OR Spain)
(setta OR sette OR "abuso spirituale" OR "manipolazione mentale" OR seita OR "grupo coercivo") AND (Italia OR Italy OR Portugal)

(sekte OR sekta OR secta OR lahko OR "control mental" OR "control mintal") AND (Nederland OR Netherlands OR Polska OR Poland OR Romania OR Cesko OR Czech OR Suomi OR Finland OR Sverige OR Sweden OR Norge OR Norway OR Danmark OR Denmark OR Ellada OR Greece)
